title: Nami and Chopper Hear the Children’s Story
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is nami and chopper hear the children’s story.
scene: The scene focuses on nami and chopper hear the children’s story, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did you come from outside the island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is this not a nursery after all?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We just want to go home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Then... Come back for us later, okay?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: ...on children who are crying for help?!!!

summary: Nami and Chopper Hear the Children’s Story. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
